privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the DFTT #8 JPEG Search test image (or a synthetically generated fallback FAT image containing random photos), located at /home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd. The target case name 'Warrant_Compliance_2024', expected extraction path '/home/ga/Reports/Allocated_Media', and manifest file path '/home/ga/Reports/media_manifest.csv' exactly match the task description and verifier scripts. Ground truth for allocated versus strictly deleted files is dynamically pre-computed at runtime using Sleuth Kit's 'fls' and 'icat' tools to ensure robust evaluation.
